name: strict
description: Strictest gate. All conditions must pass; high budget margin. Use for unattended overnight runs or any execution where no human-in-the-loop is available for mid-run intervention. Independent re-derivation (rootnode-critic-gate) is assumed for any engine evolution proposals during this mode.
notes: Strictest profile. All 7 conditions required because no real-time correction available. Budget margin high (1.3x) because mid-run budget exhaustion has no recovery path under unattended operation. Failures wait for next supervised review window. Reconsider if telemetry becomes available — strict mode benefits most from automatic budget detection. Pair with rootnode-critic-gate strict profile for end-to-end strict execution.
